summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Legal Guardian medical negligence awareness platform. Backend API testing achieved 93.8% success rate (15/16 tests passed). Frontend testing achieved 100% success rate for all core functionalities including user registration, login, story submission, admin moderation, contact form, and QR code donations. All features are working correctly with excellent integration between frontend and backend.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthorized access
minor_issues.impact: Very minor - both status codes indicate authentication failure

design_issues.issue: Webpack dev server overlay intercepts clicks in development environment
design_issues.note: Development environment issue only, not affecting production functionality

passed_tests: Home page loads with hero section, stats, and features
Navigation works for all pages (Home, About Us, Stories, Legal Resources, Donate, Contact, Login, Register)
Contact form submission works with success message
Donate page shows QR code correctly
User can submit a story successfully
Admin login works with provided credentials (admin@legalguardian.in / Admin@123)
Admin can view and moderate stories
